message:
Parser recursion guard RAII helper and comprehensive semantic resolution

parser.rs: Fix enter_recursion() to check depth >= MAX before
incrementing (not after), preventing depth leaks on recursion-limit
errors. Add with_recursion_guard() RAII helper that enter/leave
brackets a closure, used in parse_statement_inner() and
parse_select_stmt() to eliminate manual bookkeeping. Add test
verifying depth stability across repeated recursion-limit errors.

semantic.rs: Major expansion of the semantic resolver to cover
previously unresolved AST nodes:
- INSERT: source expressions, upsert target columns/WHERE, upsert
  action assignments/WHERE, RETURNING columns
- UPDATE: assignment values, FROM clause, WHERE, RETURNING, ORDER BY,
  LIMIT/OFFSET
- DELETE: WHERE, RETURNING, ORDER BY, LIMIT/OFFSET
- SELECT: ORDER BY terms, LIMIT/OFFSET expressions
- SELECT core: WINDOW definitions (partition_by, order_by, frame bounds)
- Function calls: OVER window specs
- Changed has_alias() to has_alias_local() for duplicate-alias detection
  to avoid false positives from parent scopes
- Added duplicate-alias checks for subquery and table-function aliases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
